step_rationale: Circulating biomarker for CAD; inflammatory and lipid-metabolism regulation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: miR-326 is a circulating biomarker dysregulated in CAD, modulating inflammatory and lipid-metabolism pathways in atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: Alteration of circulating miRNAs during myocardial infarction and association with lipid levels.
